        "summary": {
          "html": "Discussed Harini's seven-year background in data production support and identified lack of coding proficiency as barrier to landing data engineering positions. Discovered Harini is unemployed for one month, targeting $160k salary, and failing technical interviews despite receiving callbacks. Explained Engineer Academy's services including upskilling, resume preparation, interview coaching, and job placement support with customized pricing. Scheduled follow-up assessment with senior advisor Abigail for Monday 4pm ET to create personalized two-to-three-month action plan. Sent preparatory resources and confirmed next steps for comprehensive skills evaluation and program recommendations. Background and Current Situation Harini discovered Engineer Academy through YouTube and Instagram posts and reached out to explore data engineering job opportunities. Harini was previously employed as a data production support engineer for seven years, focusing on pipeline maintenance rather than coding. Harini was laid off one month ago and is currently unemployed and seeking new employment. Previous salary was $110k, with a target salary of $160k upon landing a new position. Technical Skills and Experience Harini possesses eight years of overall experience in the data engineering field. Harini has basic knowledge of SQL and Python but acknowledges not being proficient in coding. Harini's previous role involved supporting and maintaining pipelines rather than building them from scratch. Ivan noted that Engineer Academy typically helps students fill skill gaps in coding, which aligns with Harini's needs. Job Search Progress and Challenges Harini is currently applying to positions through LinkedIn and job portals, with assistance from a contact marketing her profile. Harini has received some interview calls but has been unable to progress to offers. Harini identifies strong coding skills in SQL and Python as mandatory requirements that interviews are testing. Harini feels unprepared for technical interviews and lacks confidence in coding assessments despite her experience. Services and Program Structure Engineer Academy provides upskilling in technical skills, resume preparation, interview coaching, and job placement support. The program includes creating a customized game plan based on background, skill gaps, and job market analysis. Pricing is customized based on individual needs, with flexible monthly payment options available. Students can potentially pay the majority of program costs using sign-up bonuses from new positions. Timeline and Next Steps Harini expressed willingness to invest two to three months in upskilling before securing a new position. Ivan scheduled a follow-up consultation with senior advisor Abigail for Monday at 4pm Eastern Time. The follow-up call will include a comprehensive skills assessment, resume review, and development of a detailed action plan. Ivan sent preparatory resources to Harini prior to the Monday call to help her better understand the program. Abigail will reach out to Harini within minutes following this call to confirm details.",

[**Core Principle:** Consistency is the key to skill acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/FHGsYPBNBtQ2L1BFHCopcnhcKhzS-zD_?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0) - [**Why:** Daily practice prevents knowledge decay and builds momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/FHGsYPBNBtQ2L1BFHCopcnhcKhzS-zD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0) - [**Time Commitment:** 15 hours/week (3 hours/day, Mon–Fri) for the first two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/FHGsYPBNBtQ2L1BFHCopcnhcKhzS-zD_?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0) - [**Action:** Schedule dedicated study blocks on the calendar to prioritize the work.](https://fathom.video/share/FHGsYPBNBtQ2L1BFHCopcnhcKhzS-zD_?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0) -         "custom.cf_v8KO9e9P1dPh5b7gMyQCOuLhOlOCHjFdjmg4ZXwFYJB": "Samuel Adedokun and Joshua Astle - May 26 VIEW RECORDING: https://fathom.video/share/ugydACj6ATy4Wga7somydSQspMKSNUTh 87 mins (No highlights) --- Meeting Purpose To explore Sam's career goals and Data Engineer Academy's (DEA) program. Key Takeaways - Significant Under-Compensation: Sam's ~$88k salary is far below the market rate for his 5 years of experience. Joshua estimates a realistic target of $180k–$200k+, representing a ~$100k annual opportunity cost. - Critical Skill Gaps: Key gaps in Python (4.5/10) and AWS (3/10) are limiting job prospects. AWS is particularly crucial as it covers ~70-75% of the cloud market. - Low Application Volume: Sam's 20 applications in April are insufficient for a competitive market where roles receive 300–1,000+ applicants. DEA's strategy is to scale this to 500+ per month. - Confidence Gap: Sam's self-limiting salary expectations ($95k–$120k) and low interview confidence (5/10) are the primary barriers to securing a high-paying role. Topics Sam's Career Situation & Goals - Current Role: Data Analyst at Ally (insurance dept.) for 5 years. - Motivation: Stagnant career after being passed over for a promotion in Jan 2026. Seeks a new chapter with increased compensation, a senior title, and skill expansion (Python, R, AI). - Job Search: Applied to ~20 roles in April, resulting in only two phone screens and no offers. - Salary Target: A self-limiting range of $95k–$120k, far below the market potential. Skill Assessment (0-10 Scale) - SQL: 8/10 (Confident) - Python: 4.5/10 (Foundation from Master's; needs refresh) - AWS: 3/10 (No experience; uses Snowflake/Azure) - Data Modeling: 8.5/10 (Strong with fact/dimension tables) - Power BI: 8/10 (Primary visualization tool) - AI: Real-world experience with Copilot and a proprietary tool. Market Reality & Opportunity Cost - Market Rate: Joshua used Levels.fyi to show the market rate for Sam's experience: - Senior Data Analyst: ~$175k+ TC - Data Engineer: ~$250k+ TC - Opportunity Cost: Staying at Ally costs Sam ~$100k per year in lost earnings. - Resume Strategy: Current resume is keyword-focused. DEA's method uses a 'Project → Tools → Quantifiable Value' structure to pass AI scanners and demonstrate business impact. DEA Program Overview - Goal: Double Sam's salary within 4–6 months. - Gold Pathway ($20k): Includes education, application management, and interview prep. - Education: Personalized plan to fill skill gaps (Python, AWS, DBT, Databricks) via real-world projects. - Application Management: DEA team applies to 500+ roles/month. - Interview Guarantee: 20 interviews in 6 months or full refund. - Interview Prep: Unlimited mock interviews using a scraped database of current questions. - Negotiation: DEA team negotiates offers on Sam's behalf. - Silver Pathway ($9k): Application management and interview prep only (no education). Next Steps - Joshua: Send an invite to the 'Ask Me Anything' (AMA) session with CEO Chris for May 27 at 5:30 PM ET. - Sam: Attend the AMA to get direct guidance from Chris on career strategy and market value. Samuel's Background and Career Transition Goal Samuel is a data analyst with five years of experience at Ally Insurance seeking to transition to a senior data engineering role. He holds a bachelor's degree in information systems and a master's degree in business analytics. Samuel has applied to senior analyst roles but has had unsuccessful phone interviews despite believing his skills and experience match the positions. He brings approximately a decade of SQL experience and foundation knowledge in Python and R programming from his master's program. Compensation and Role Expectations Samuel initially targeted compensation close to 100k or above for a senior role. Cosmin indicated that Data Engineer Academy typically sees data engineering roles in the 120k to 160k range for starting positions, with senior roles exceeding 200k. Samuel currently earns 80k and is interested in reaching the senior data engineering level starting at 200k. Cosmin mentioned the academy recently placed a student with zero tech industry background into a 150k role. Skills Assessment and Program Overview Data Engineer Academy's approach involves analyzing existing skills (SQL, Python, etc.) and identifying gaps in areas like Java, Scala, Data Warehousing tools, and cloud platforms. The program covers Spark, Airflow, Azure, AWS, and databases including PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Snowflake. Samuel acknowledged his Python skills need refreshing since he hasn't used them recently, but he has a strong foundation to build upon. The academy applies on behalf of candidates to 1000 jobs per month and maintains a network with recruiters from Fortune 500 companies. Program Guarantees and Timeline Data Engineer Academy guarantees 20 interviews within six months. For candidates with Samuel's experience level, the typical timeline to land a data engineering role is between two and four months. He paid a significant upfront fee (~$10k) for this guarantee, making the unexpected charge frustrating.](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0) - [**Resolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0) - [Mihajlo will process a $99 refund today.](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0) - [Mihajlo will investigate the contract details after receiving a copy.](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0) ### Project Status & SME Guidance - [**Healthcare Project:**](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0) - [Initially complex due to its scale: 1.5M+ rows in the FAQ table and 20+ supporting dimension tables.](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0) - [Required significant time to understand the data model, which was aided by a provided dictionary PDF.](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0) - [Zaur is now making progress on the required histograms and connection analyses.](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0) - [**Walmart Project:**](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0) - [Work has also begun on this project.](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0) - [**SME Guidance Conflict:**](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0) - [**Yash (leaving):** Permitted use of Snowflake or dbt.](https://fathom.video/share/ciLErd-eTcAkzMZkqt757CasAyKZEcKH?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0) -         "activity_at": "2026-05-22T14:34:57.501000+00:00",
        "contact_id": null,
        "created_by": "user_RoWq89U2oZOlTTfJScR9pTREnX3AAeNdKnw4YOOcYwG",
        "created_by_name": "user_eb1efaee45a59705808492017b599a88",
        "custom.cf_3JFRKeLpnUvmsOsVG478u5iAQZ5i5dPmvKbIkYLUaaH": "2026-05-22T14:00:00+00:00",
        "custom.cf_7EQ4NbImGdxDOQNwHVneg8JIjZj7wxprE3tMGhtwDOD": "NA",
        "custom.cf_FF21Vz7XR43wnJqBInUDlMs685rl9hqxiGT3TH4Cv8K": "NA",
        "custom.cf_v8KO9e9P1dPh5b7gMyQCOuLhOlOCHjFdjmg4ZXwFYJB": "## Meeting Purpose [Guide Zaur on a complex data project and discuss career paths.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0) ## Key Takeaways - [**Project Strategy:** Use an LLM (e.g., Gemini) to auto-generate a data model diagram from column names, bypassing manual discovery of the 20+ `DIMM` table relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0) - [**Architecture Plan:** Propose a medallion architecture (S3 → Snowflake/dbt) and get approval on a diagram *before* building to ensure alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0) - [**Career Path:** A Data Engineer + AI combination is a strong strategy for entering a new field with high demand and less competition than the saturated Data Science market.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0) - [**AI Course:** Zaur will consider the academy's AI course after finishing current projects, pending a payment plan discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0) ## Topics ### Project Block: Healthcare Data Modeling - [**Problem:** Zaur is blocked on a healthcare project due to its complexity, specifically modeling relationships between a fact table and ~20 `DIMM` tables.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0) - [**Goal:** Build a star schema within a medallion architecture to create clean, business-ready tables for analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0) - [**Current Progress:** Grouped tables by domain (e.g., clinical quality, citations) and identified `measure code` as a potential join key.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0) ### Proposed Solution: LLM-Assisted Modeling - [**Core Advice:** Use an LLM to automate relationship discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0) - [**Process:** Input all column names and documentation → ask the LLM to generate a data model diagram.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0) - [**Rationale:** This leverages the LLM for manual work while Zaur focuses on validation and design.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0) - [**Data Quality:** Zaur found no missing values. Yash confirmed this is possible and advised checking for duplicates and outliers as well.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0) ### Architecture & Implementation Plan - [**Medallion Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0) - [**Bronze Layer:** S3 for raw data storage.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0) - [**Silver Layer:** Snowflake for cleaning and transformations.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0) - [**Gold Layer:** Materialized views in Snowflake, built with dbt for testing and version control.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0) - [**Deliverable:** A dashboard (e.g., Looker, Tableau, Streamlit) connected to the Gold layer.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0) - [**Approval Gate:** Zaur must submit an architecture diagram for approval *before* starting any build work.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0) ### Career Path Discussion: DS vs. DE vs. AI - [**Context:** Zaur, an IT analyst with two Master's degrees, is transitioning to data. Chris advised preparing for both Data Science (DS) and Data Engineering (DE) roles.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0) - [**Data Science (DS) Path:**](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0) - [**Challenge:** High competition; academic skills often lack production experience (e.g., MLOps, drift detection, SHAP analysis).](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0) - [**Data Engineering (DE) Path:**](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0) - [**Advantage:** Larger teams and higher demand, leading to more job opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0) - [**Artificial Intelligence (AI) Path:**](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0) - [**Opportunity:** A new, high-demand field with less competition than DS.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0) - [**Role Focus:** Building systems with models (e.g., RAG) using tools like LangChain, LangGraph, and CrewAI, not building the models themselves.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0) - [**Timing:** An 'opportunity window' exists for the next year before the field saturates.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0) ### AI Course & Financials - [**Interest:** Zaur is interested in the academy's AI course but is hesitant about the cost, having already paid ~10k for the current program.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0) - [**Proposed Solution:** Yash suggested a payment plan to spread the cost, with payments likely starting after Zaur lands a new job.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0) - [**Decision:** Zaur will focus on current projects first, then evaluate the AI course and payment options.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0) ## Next Steps - [**Zaur:**](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0) - [Use an LLM to generate a data model diagram for the healthcare project.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0) - [Draft a medallion architecture diagram (S3 → Snowflake/dbt) and submit for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0) - [After project completion, discuss AI course payment options with the CSM.](https://fathom.video/share/2mvitbkuMihdyniBzuxUYPnQQ5wqBEkY?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)",

        "custom.cf_v8KO9e9P1dPh5b7gMyQCOuLhOlOCHjFdjmg4ZXwFYJB": "## Meeting Purpose [Review Zaur's project progress and outline future program steps.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0) ## Key Takeaways - [Zaur completed the CodeBuild & Lambda project and is ~20% through the AWS Airflow project.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0) - [A documentation gap for ECR projects was resolved; Zaur will now contact Nina directly for project files.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0) - [The program will bridge the 'bits and pieces' learning phase with 'End-to-End Projects' and a new 'Story Creation' module for interview prep.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0) - [A $1,000 referral bonus is available for bringing in new students.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0) ## Topics ### Project Progress & Blockers - [**Completed:** CodeBuild & Lambda local deployment.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0) - [**Rationale:** Chose hands-on work over video guides to build confidence.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0) - [**In Progress:** AWS Airflow project (~20% complete).](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0) - [**Blocker:** Missing documentation for ECR projects.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0) - [**Issue:** Project links led to MP4 video files instead of step-by-step guides.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0) - [**Resolution:** The instructor confirmed the projects are intentionally hands-on for conceptual understanding.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0) ### Future Program Structure - [**Zaur's Concern:** How to connect disparate concepts (AWS, Snowflake, DBT) for interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0) - [**Solution:** The program is structured to address this:](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0) - [**1. End-to-End Projects:** Integrate all prior skills (SQL, Python, AWS) into cohesive systems.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0) - [**2. Story Creation Module:** A new component to structure interview answers.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0) - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0) - [**Call 1 (SME Paviru):** Learn to frame project experiences as compelling interview stories.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0) - [**Calls 2 & 3 (Coach):** Refine and polish these stories.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0) - [**Outcome:** A written narrative for each project, ready for interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0) - [**3. Interview Prep Questions:** A tech-stack-specific question bank, introduced during the Story Creation call.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0) ### Referral Program - [**Rationale:** Students with accountability partners finish faster and land better roles.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0) - [**Offer:** $1,000 bonus for each new student referred.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0) - [**Action:** Zaur will provide a list of 2–3 serious contacts.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0) ## Next Steps - [**Zaur:**](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0) - [Complete the AWS Airflow project.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0) - [Contact Nina directly for any missing project files.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0) - [Provide Mihajlo with 2–3 serious contacts for the referral program.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0) - [**Mihajlo:**](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0) - [Initiate the Story Creation module after Zaur completes End-to-End Projects.](https://fathom.video/share/vammosLXudsZ3pD2LpWXvr1_9aauW8y-?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)",

        "note_html": "Enoch Boateng and Olivier Auguste - May 25 VIEW RECORDING - 60 mins (No highlights) Meeting Purpose To explore Enoch's interest in a data career and pitch the Data Engineering Academy's program. Key Takeaways Goal: Enoch, a PhD student, wants to transition into data (Business Analytics/BI) for a ~25% salary increase ($70k → $100k+), either as a side hustle or a full career pivot. Pitch: Olivier proposed the $6,000 'Visa Package,' a structured program providing a personalized plan, real-world projects, resume rebranding, and interview coaching. Decision: Enoch is interested but needs to vet the academy's credibility and finalize finances. He will research the academy and confirm his budget before a follow-up call. Outcome: A follow-up call is scheduled for Tuesday, June 2, at 10 AM to make a final decision. Topics Enoch's Career Goal & Motivation Background: PhD student in Development Science with prior experience managing World Bank and Mastercard Foundation programs in Ghana. Motivation: Apply existing research/data analysis skills to a mainstream data career. Learning History: Prior self-study (Python, Excel, Power BI) was 'disjointed' and lacked a clear goal, leading to inconsistent progress. Timeline: Aims for proficiency within 6–12 months, aligning with his May/June 2027 PhD completion. Work Authorization: Currently on an F1 visa; has started the EB2 (NIW) green card process, which would remove future sponsorship requirements. Proposed Solution: 'Visa Package' Investment: $6,000 for one year of access, then $99/month. Program Components: Personalized Plan: A reverse-engineered learning path based on a skills assessment and target roles. Real-time Projects: Practical projects for skill application, resume building, and interview practice. Career Services: Resume Rebranding: To highlight quantifiable impact for a career transition. Recruiter Network: Access to 13,000 recruiters (3,000+ placements). Interview Prep: 10 mock interviews (technical & behavioral) with subject matter experts. Salary Negotiation: Training to secure a 30–50k compensation increase. Decision & Objections Objection 1: Credibility Concern: Enoch needs to verify the academy's legitimacy and the authenticity of its testimonials before committing. Rationale: To ensure the investment is with a credible organization. Objection 2: Cost & Payment Concern: The $6,000 price is a significant financial commitment. Financing: Olivier noted Enoch's ~720 credit score qualifies him for a payment plan (~$300–$500/month). Budgeting: Enoch needs time to reorganize his next month's budget to accommodate the cost. Next Steps Olivier: Send calendar invite for the follow-up call. Email program breakdown and alumni testimonials. Enoch: Research the academy's credibility. Finalize his budget for the investment. Both: Meet on Tuesday, June 2, at 10 AM for a final decision. Action Items Email Enoch: Visa Package breakdown + alumni contacts + testimonials  -  WATCH (5 secs) Check credit score; confirm monthly budget for Olivier  -  WATCH (5 secs) Send Enoch calendar invite for Jun 2 10:00 follow-up; then Enoch attend  -  WATCH (5 secs)",

        "custom.cf_HWa8eGa4tTRW4yGJRSvRotesxxQd0JEaXINpzf7Tsdp": "Enoch Boateng and Olivier Auguste - May 25 VIEW RECORDING - 60 mins (No highlights) Meeting Purpose To explore Enoch's interest in a data career and pitch the Data Engineering Academy's program. Key Takeaways Goal: Enoch, a PhD student, wants to transition into data (Business Analytics/BI) for a ~25% salary increase ($70k → $100k+), either as a side hustle or a full career pivot. Pitch: Olivier proposed the $6,000 'Visa Package,' a structured program providing a personalized plan, real-world projects, resume rebranding, and interview coaching. Decision: Enoch is interested but needs to vet the academy's credibility and finalize finances. He will research the academy and confirm his budget before a follow-up call. Outcome: A follow-up call is scheduled for Tuesday, June 2, at 10 AM to make a final decision. Topics Enoch's Career Goal & Motivation Background: PhD student in Development Science with prior experience managing World Bank and Mastercard Foundation programs in Ghana. Motivation: Apply existing research/data analysis skills to a mainstream data career. Learning History: Prior self-study (Python, Excel, Power BI) was 'disjointed' and lacked a clear goal, leading to inconsistent progress. Timeline: Aims for proficiency within 6–12 months, aligning with his May/June 2027 PhD completion. Work Authorization: Currently on an F1 visa; has started the EB2 (NIW) green card process, which would remove future sponsorship requirements. Proposed Solution: 'Visa Package' Investment: $6,000 for one year of access, then $99/month. Program Components: Personalized Plan: A reverse-engineered learning path based on a skills assessment and target roles. Real-time Projects: Practical projects for skill application, resume building, and interview practice. Career Services: Resume Rebranding: To highlight quantifiable impact for a career transition. Recruiter Network: Access to 13,000 recruiters (3,000+ placements). Interview Prep: 10 mock interviews (technical & behavioral) with subject matter experts. Salary Negotiation: Training to secure a 30–50k compensation increase. Decision & Objections Objection 1: Credibility Concern: Enoch needs to verify the academy's legitimacy and the authenticity of its testimonials before committing. Rationale: To ensure the investment is with a credible organization. Objection 2: Cost & Payment Concern: The $6,000 price is a significant financial commitment. Financing: Olivier noted Enoch's ~720 credit score qualifies him for a payment plan (~$300–$500/month). Budgeting: Enoch needs time to reorganize his next month's budget to accommodate the cost. Next Steps Olivier: Send calendar invite for the follow-up call. Email program breakdown and alumni testimonials. Enoch: Research the academy's credibility. Finalize his budget for the investment. Both: Meet on Tuesday, June 2, at 10 AM for a final decision.
